steps.title: Interpret the slope
steps.content:
• The slope of 57 means that for each 1°C increase in temperature, the model predicts 57 more visitors.
  • That is $$57\text{ visitors}/^\circ\text{C}$$.

steps.title: Calculate the increase for a 5°C rise
steps.content:
• For a 5°C increase, multiply the slope by 5: $$57 \times 5 = 285$$ visitors.
  • The answer is 285.
